channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Collapsed drain cover, 27th March
item.description:
Collapsed drain cover outside Maylands convenience store been about a week danger to pedestrians especially in the dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-47, Kimberley Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road barrier left on pavement, 27th March
item.description:
This road barrier has been left on the pavement at the junction of Southend Road and the Waitrose entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Sofa parts blocking pavement, 27th March
item.description:
Couch left blocking pavement after being removed from binstore by bin operatives for access

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134, Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several fridges dumped, 27th March
item.description:
Several fridges plus mattress dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moody Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedding left outside building by Estate cleaners who leave different types of rubbish here on a regular basis., 27th March
item.description:
Bedding left outside building by Poets Corner Estate cleaners who leave different types of rubbish here on a regular basis. This is a health and safety risk plus also a fire risk. There are communal waste bins/site five yards away where this could be placed instead of just being dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lomond Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Hot Wired Bike, 27th March
item.description:
The bike is abandoned and has been left on the property, it has been hot-wired and not moved for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car still there, waiting to be vandalised further, 27th March
item.description:
This car has been there for around 6-8 weeks now. Once again, the police will not take action and say it's a council matter. Once again, the plates do not match the car. Please take action and remove the car.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road work barriers in the road, 27th March
item.description:
The barriers were left against a telecoms pole following repairs to gas mains a few weeks ago. Blown over in high winds 2 days ago, at a point where the road narrows, they are now a dangerous obstruction.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Terrace, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement, 27th March
item.description:
Cot and toys dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sheldon Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Party trash, 27th March
item.description:
Balloons and bags left outside a party spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anglesea Avenue, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 95 Brondesbury villas, 27th March
item.description:
Bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Broken cover, 27th March
item.description:
The cover of this hole has collapsed into itself and is dangerous as it’s in direct contact with people walking and cars that need to use the drop curb to get to their garages

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Austen Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area under stairs up to flats 24-43 Lorrimore Square, 27th March
item.description:
Has been there for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crate of rubbish flytipped next to entrance, 27th March
item.description:
Crate of rubbish flytipped next to entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London

item.description:
Dumped old clothes and shoes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Car parts still there on Weds 25/03 despite previous report saying fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leybourne Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of bulk rubbish adjacent to 1-12 Nightingale Corner along the pathway near 84-88 Wotton Green, 27th March
item.description:
Fly tip of bulk rubbish, this land falls under the responsibility of London Borough of Bromley. Please can this be removed as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-12, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rolls of carpet, 27th March
item.description:
Grey van fly tipping trade waste into residential bins. Number plate DP69 VBL
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arbor Close, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
